blended.narrative: Mont-Tremblant is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,111 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
